metadata.title: ColorMinutes
metadata.description: Turn meetings into clear, color-coded minutes with motions, votes, and action items.

common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.headline: Turn every meeting into
home.description: Upload a meeting recording or notes, and ColorMinutes pulls out motions, votes, and action items—minutes your team can read at a glance.
home.previewVoteText: Approve Q2 roadmap and staffing plan.
home.previewActionText: PM to circulate revised timeline by Friday.
home.previewNoteText: Budget discussion deferred to next week's finance review.

options.label: How it works
options.title: Three ways to capture your meetings

transcription.title: Meeting transcription
transcription.description: Upload an MP3 or MP4 recording. We transcribe the audio and extract motions, votes, and action items—automatically color-coded.

recording.title: Record meeting
recording.description: Capture audio directly in your browser. No extra software—just hit record and we'll handle the rest.

ocr.title: PDF OCR
ocr.description: Already have meeting notes as a PDF? We extract the text—even from scanned pages—and turn them into structured, color-coded minutes.

publish.label: Share & export
publish.title: Publish pages or download PDF
publish.subtitle: Share minutes your way. Every option is built with security in mind.

publish.title: Publish pages
publish.description: Share a beautiful, color-coded web page with your team. Choose public or link-only visibility.

download.title: Download PDF
download.description: Export polished, print-ready minutes as a PDF. Perfect for archives, boards, and official records.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple plans for every team
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your meeting volume grows.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For professionals who run meetings weekly.

team.name: Team
team.description: For organizations with shared minute workflows.

security.question: How secure are my meeting files?
security.answer: All uploads are encrypted in transit and at rest. Published pages use secure URLs, and you control whether minutes are public or link-only.

formats.question: What file formats do you support?
formats.answer: Upload MP3 or MP4 recordings for transcription, record directly in your browser, or upload PDF notes—including scanned documents via OCR.

ocr.question: How does PDF OCR work?
ocr.answer: We extract text from your PDF pages. If a page is scanned or image-based, our OCR engine reads the content so nothing gets left behind.

publish.question: What's the difference between public and link-only publishing?
publish.answer: Public pages use a readable URL based on your meeting title and may be indexed by search engines. Link-only pages use an unlisted ID and won't appear in search results.

colors.question: What do the colors mean in the minutes?
colors.answer: Motions, votes, action items, and general notes each get a distinct color so readers can scan the document and find what matters in seconds.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. Free accounts stay free forever. Paid plans can be cancelled at any time—your existing minutes remain accessible.

loginPage.headline: Pick up where you
loginPage.description: Sign in to manage your meetings, generate color-coded minutes, and share polished pages with your team.

registerPage.headline: Start turning meetings into
registerPage.description: Create your account to upload recordings, extract motions and action items, and publish minutes your team can read at a glance.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link. In development, check the API console for the link.

resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.missingToken: Missing reset token. Use the link from your email.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.description: Upload a recording or notes to generate color-coded minutes.

editDescription.processing: Your file is being transcribed or processed.
editDescription.ready: Review and edit the extracted content below, then generate color minutes.
editDescription.generating: Color minutes are being generated from your content.
editDescription.failed: Processing failed. You can update the title and retry by re-uploading.

meetings.generatingBanner: Generating color-coded minutes from your content…

publishDialog.title: Publish meeting
publishDialog.description: Choose how others can access these minutes.
publishDialog.publicDescription: Discoverable with a readable URL based on the meeting name. Search engines may index this page.
publishDialog.linkDescription: Unlisted URL using the meeting ID. Search engines will not index this page.
publishDialog.publishedDescription: Share this link with your team.

record.title: Record meeting
record.description: Use your microphone to record the meeting directly in the browser. We'll turn it into color-coded minutes.

upload.title: Upload meeting recording
upload.description: Add an MP3 or MP4 of your meeting. We'll produce color-coded minutes with motions, votes, and action items.

notes.title: Upload meeting notes
notes.description: Add a PDF of existing meeting notes. We'll extract and color-code motions, votes, and action items.

upload.dropPdf: or drag and drop your PDF
